experience.ePol-description: Development of web applications for business processes with focus on scalability and performance.
experience.latitudo-description: Development and refactoring of web applications using Vue.js and .NET 6, including backend services and REST APIs.
experience.baleraortica-description: Developed a booking platform improving operations and user experience.

skill.label: SKILLS
skill.title: Skills
skill.sub: Technologies used in web application and software development
skill.angular-description: Development of complex single-page applications using Angular, including modular architecture, state management, advanced routing, and performance optimization. Experience building scalable and maintainable front-end architectures.
skill.vue-description: Development of reactive web applications using component-based architecture with a focus on usability and performance.
skill.flutter-description: Cross-platform mobile and web application development with shared codebase, focusing on performance and consistent UI.
skill.csharp-description: Application development using C# and .NET across web, desktop, and mobile environments. Experience with object-oriented programming, Entity Framework, and complex business logic implementation.
skill.laravel-description: Backend development and REST API implementation with authentication and data management.
skill.python-description: Used for scripting, backend services, and data processing, including computer vision applications.
skill.sql-description: Design and management of relational databases (MySQL, SQL Server, SQLite). Experience with advanced queries, stored procedures, functions and views.

project.label: PROJECTS
project.title: Projects
project.sub: Projects showcasing real-world software development, system design, and complex problem solving
project.project-collecchio-description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application (iOS and Android) designed to improve urban accessibility by allowing users to report and classify architectural barriers. The project integrates computer vision models using TensorFlow Lite for automatic image analysis and risk categorization. Built with Flutter using a scalable architecture and local data management.
project.project-piacenza-ar-description: Developed an augmented reality application for the tourism sector based on 3D models of city landmarks. The project combines Unity, Vuforia, and Google Earth to create an interactive system capable of overlaying digital content onto the real world, delivering an immersive user experience.
project.project-armatamente-20-description: Recovered and fully rebuilt the ARMATAMENTE project website, which had been previously lost. The work included content restructuring, redesign of the site architecture, and deployment, improving accessibility and usability.
project.project-museo-3d-description: Designed and developed a fully explorable 3D environment for interactive historical content visualization. Built using Unity and C#, the system allows users to navigate and interact with dynamic content. The project received recognition for innovation and gained international visibility (EUSTORY network).
